headline: Wells Fargo Signals Strong Q2 Fee Income Growth at Bernstein Conference
summary: WFC sees strong Q2'26 fee-income momentum, driven by mid-teen IB and markets growth and rising wealth management revenues.

headline: GS Expects Record Global M&A in 2026: Will This Boost Its IB Business?
summary: Goldman forecasts near-record 2026 M&A activity as rising corporate deals and private equity exits support investment banking growth.

headline: How The Varonis Systems (VRNS) Story Is Shifting With AI Security And SaaS Execution Questions
summary: Varonis Systems is back in focus after its fair value estimate was adjusted from US$33.43 to US$36.32 per share, giving investors fresh input on how the stock is being valued. This shift aligns with recent research that combines optimism around data security demand and new AI use cases with ongoing questions about competition and the company’s business model execution. Read on to see what is influencing this evolving analyst narrative and how you can track it as new information becomes...
